title: Bigger or Smaller?

sections.heading: WHAT YOU'LL NEED TO PLAY
sections.middleText1:
two switches 
record:
"bigger" on one switch 
"smaller" on the other
sections.middleText2: cards with a motivating image or symbol e.g. animals

sections.heading: HOW TO PLAY
sections.body:
1. Hold up a card. 
2. Ask the switch user "Do you think the next card will show a bigger or smaller animal?"
3. The switch user makes their guess "bigger" or "smaller" using their switches.

tooltipText: Use 2 switches to guess whether the next animal is going to be "bigger" or "smaller" than the one shown
